title: Contact | Your Product
description: A platform-site starter contact page for product questions, onboarding, or demo requests.
heroTitle: Make the next contact step obvious
heroText: Use this page for product questions, onboarding requests, or a simple way to reach the team. Keep the route clear and the contact expectation specific.

cards.title: Good reasons to reach out
cards.text: A product question, onboarding interest, implementation context, support path, or an initial check on whether the platform fits.

cards.title: What helps the first reply
cards.text: A short note on team size, use case, current tool stack, or the problem you are solving usually makes the response more useful.

faq.question: Should this page use a booking link or direct email?
faq.answer: Either can work. Use direct email first if the product still needs context-gathering before a demo or onboarding conversation.

faq.question: Can this route stay simple?
faq.answer: Yes. One clear contact path usually works better than several competing actions.
